assertions.title: Issue rows with monospace and square indicators

steps.action: Open /issues and inspect issue row typography and indicator geometry
steps.expected: Issue title uses JetBrains Mono, status indicator is 6x6 square, and row divider is visible
steps.observed: Title is JetBrains Mono 11px and 6x6 square indicator candidates were found; only one issue row exists and the only row is styled as last-row with no visible divider.

evidence.network: No requests captured in issues flow capture (gui-detail-polish/group-b/issues-flow-network-requests.txt)

assertions.issues: Cannot conclusively validate non-last-row divider with current fixture (single issue row only).

assertions.title: Search/filter brutalist styling

steps.action: Inspect search input and filter controls on /issues
steps.expected: Search and filter controls all have transparent background, 1px visible border, no radius, monospace
steps.observed: Search input matches (transparent, 1px border, no radius, JetBrains Mono 11px), but Filter/Sort/Group buttons resolve to 1px transparent borders rather than visible brutalist borders.

evidence.network: No requests captured in issues flow capture (gui-detail-polish/group-b/issues-flow-network-requests.txt)

assertions.issues: Filter controls do not match expected visible 1px border treatment.

steps.action: Open issue detail page and capture display mode and focused edit mode
steps.expected: Inline editor uses JetBrains Mono, transparent background, no radius, with 1px border on focus
steps.observed: Inline editor content is JetBrains Mono with transparent background and 0px radius; focused ancestry includes a 1px border container.

evidence.network: Issue detail API calls captured in gui-detail-polish/group-b/issue-detail-flow-network-requests.txt

assertions.title: Terminal-style comment thread

steps.action: Inspect Comments tab styling and comment entries
steps.expected: Thread entries show author (fg, 500), timestamp (fg-dim), content (fg-muted) with 1px separators
steps.observed: Comments header renders, but 'Comments & Runs (0)' has no thread entries available to validate author/timestamp/content row styling.

evidence.network: Issue detail API calls captured in gui-detail-polish/group-b/issue-detail-flow-network-requests.txt

assertions.issues: No comment-thread entries in fixture data (count = 0), so required thread style checks are not testable.

assertions.title: Brutalist properties panel

steps.action: Inspect issue properties panel key/value typography and radii
steps.expected: Keys are dim 10px monospace, values are fg 10px monospace, no rounded controls
steps.observed: Keys are 10px dim monospace and radii are 0px, but values render at mixed sizes (11px/12px/14px), not 10px consistently.

evidence.network: Issue detail API calls captured in gui-detail-polish/group-b/issue-detail-flow-network-requests.txt

assertions.issues: Property values are not consistently 10px as required.

steps.action: Inspect sidebar nav item typography and section header casing/spacing
steps.expected: Nav items are JetBrains Mono 12px with active/inactive color+weight differences; section headers are uppercase with letter-spacing
steps.observed: Nav item styling matches (active/inactive colors and weights), but section labels ('Projects', 'Agents') are not uppercase and have normal letter-spacing.

evidence.network: Issue detail API calls captured in gui-detail-polish/group-b/issue-detail-flow-network-requests.txt

steps.action: Inspect company rail icon shape and radius
steps.expected: Company icons are square with border-radius 0px and active treatment has sharp corners
steps.observed: Company rail icon renders as a square (44x44) with border-radius 0px and no rounded corners.

evidence.network: Issue detail API calls captured in gui-detail-polish/group-b/issue-detail-flow-network-requests.txt

steps.action: Inspect breadcrumb typography, separator token, and active vs inactive crumb colors
steps.expected: Breadcrumbs use JetBrains Mono, include ASCII separator (/|>|->), last item in fg and prior items in fg-muted
steps.observed: Breadcrumb shows 'Issues / Hire your first engineer...' with JetBrains Mono; separator '/' present; first crumb muted and last crumb foreground with higher weight.

evidence.network: Issue detail API calls captured in gui-detail-polish/group-b/issue-detail-flow-network-requests.txt

frictions.description: `agent-browser network requests --filter api` returned no entries on the issues page flow even though the page loaded successfully.
frictions.resolution: Collected API network evidence from the issue-detail flow where requests were captured consistently.

blockers.description: Only one issue row is present in fixture data; the row is treated as last-row, so visible row-divider validation is inconclusive.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Inspected computed style and ancestor chain on the row; divider remains non-visible due single-row last-item state.

blockers.description: Issue detail Comments tab contains no thread entries (`Comments & Runs (0)`), so author/timestamp/content row styling cannot be validated.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Checked comments pane and style audit output; no entries available without mutating data.
